Now if you add the figures of two contiguous houses and
divide the result by two, you get the Sandhi or junction of those

LAGNA AND OTHI K HOUSES 27
two Bhavas. For example, let us find out the Sandhi between
the J2th and Lagna Bhavas. By adding the two figures,
51-10'-30'-26" and 6s-10o-32'-4" and dividing the result, 11-21-2-30,
by 2, we get the figure, 5-25-31-15 which is the Sandhi between
the 12th and the Jst Bhavas. What does it mean ? It means
that the lagna Bhava starts from 25-31-15 of Kanya, and the
!2th Bhava extends upto that point. The Lagna therefore,
extends from this point to 6s-25;,-3115"
Thus you will see that the Lagna is always 30 degrees in extent.
Now if a planet were posited in Tula, say in the 2Bth degree
